title: 'Thought it was terrorist explosion': London train crash passengers 'had broken legs, could not speak'; driver dead
summary_full: A tragic train collision near Bedford claimed the life of a driver and left over 80 injured, with survivors recounting scenes of panic and devastation. Passengers described being violently thrown, witnessing smoke, and hearing screams as emergency services rushed to the site. The incident involved two East Midlands Railway services heading towards London St Pancras, leading to a complete suspension of services.
